claims.claim: Web-scraped training data is degrading while physically verified authentic human social behavioral data provides irreplaceable training signals.
The quality of web-scraped training data is declining over time due to AI-generated content pollution.
Current AI-generated content detection methods are limited and remain in an arms race with generation methods.
Authentic human social behavioral data provides signals for social reasoning tasks that synthetic data cannot fully replace.
There is an important research gap in platforms that generate physically verified authentic human behavioral data as a byproduct for AI training.
